page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the custom ARM-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) operating at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz with 1 thread per core. It is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The processor includes 64 KB of L1 data cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates moderate single-core performance alongside weaker multi-core scaling. In stress-ng testing, the single-core CPU performance scored 1818.78 (average), while the multi-core score reached 3601.68 (weak). Memory performance is mixed, with read-only cached small-block bandwidth at 204.34 GB/sec (weak) and uncached large-block read bandwidth at 38.93 GB/sec (average). Cryptographic and extended instruction capabilities are limited, as shown by a PassMark CPU encryption score of 323.63 and an extended instructions score of 1562.25, both falling into the bottom 10% of tested hardware. However, single-threaded operations like gzip compression (28.38 GB/sec) and bzip3 decompression (11.2 GB/sec) perform at average levels.

Given its dedicated ARM-based architecture and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g8y.large offers a cost-efficient option for workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation without requiring high-performance multi-threaded execution or specialized x86 instructions. It is suitable for lightweight web serving, basic database operations, and simple text processing or low-demand background tasks. It is less suited for heavy cryptographic workloads, high-throughput database clusters, or complex multi-threaded applications due to its lower multi-core and memory write performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by the ARM-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM, 64 MB of L3 cache, and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show average single-core capabilities, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1818.78 and average single-threaded compression speeds. However, multi-core scaling and cryptographic performance are relatively weak, as reflected in a PassMark CPU encryption score of 323.63. This instance represents a cost-efficient option for lightweight, dedicated ARM workloads. It is recommended for general-purpose tasks such as basic web serving, minor database operations, and simple background processing that do not require intensive multi-threaded computing or x86-specific instruction sets.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.large is a general-purpose ARM instance with 2 dedicated YiTian710 vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for lightweight web serving and basic database tasks.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.large is an ARM-based general-purpose instance with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8 GB RAM, optimized for lightweight workloads.
tagline: An ARM-powered general-purpose instance offering dedicated physical cores and balanced memory for lightweight, cost-efficient cloud workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by Alibaba YiTian710 ARM-based processor at 2.75 GHz
2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) with 8.0 GB of RAM
Baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps with no local storage
Average single-core performance for compression and decompression tasks
Recommended for lightweight web serving and basic database operations
